nasb.text: “And you, son of man, will you judge, will you judge the bloody city? Then cause her to know all her abominations.

esv.text: “And you, son of man, will you judge, will you judge the bloody city? Then declare to her all her abominations.

cnv.text: “人子啊，你要審判嗎？你要審判這流人血的城嗎？你要使這城知道它一切可憎的事。

ccb.text: “人子啊，你要审判耶路撒冷这杀人流血的城。你要审判她，使她知道自己一切可憎的行为。
